name: Article remediation Pass 1
description: Completes research and MDX for auto/remediation PRs; merges when audits pass. Stops when remediation program cap (20) is reached.

prompts.prompt:
You are running Pass 1 article remediation for avni-guy. Log prefix: [cursor-remediation-auto].

Read config/remediation-batch.json on this PR branch for batchSlugs and pipelineSlugs.
Read config/remediation-program.json. If enabled is false or completedSlugs length >= maxArticles, stop and comment on the PR without merging.

For each slug in the batch (max 5):
1. Follow .cursor/rules/article-research-loop.mdc: complete content-research/<slug>.md (at least 2000 Hebrew words, research_completed_at at least 300s after research_started_at). Commit the study.
2. Run: pnpm run research:audit -- <slug>
3. Follow content-enhancer-loop.mdc and content-eeat-structure-loop.mdc: rewrite src/content/blog/<slug>.mdx.
4. Apply internal-links-pillar-cluster-loop, internal-links-loop, homepage-brand-internal-links-loop for that slug.
5. Run: CONTENT_AUDIT_SLUGS=<slug> pnpm run content:audit

After all slugs pass:
- Run: node scripts/run-article-remediation.mjs --verify with PIPELINE_SLUGS set to the batch.
- Update config/remediation-program.json completedSlugs for each passing slug (idempotent).
- Commit content-research, MDX, and remediation-program.json on this branch.

If every check passes, merge this PR into main. If any fail, do not merge; comment with failures.

Do not delete content-research files. No Unicode em dash U+2014.

In the Automations editor, restrict the trigger to PR head branches matching auto/remediation-* if the UI supports branch filters.
